modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to attach PDF to email in Adobe Acrobat.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to send a PDF using Adobe Acrobat, but when I click on "Send as attachment," nothing happens. It doesn't open Outlook like it should. I am using Windows, and this feature is not working at all. It's really frustrating because I need to send this document quickly.
short_description: Unable to attach PDF to email in Adobe Acrobat.
description: I was trying to send a PDF using Adobe Acrobat, but when I click on "Send as attachment," nothing happens. It doesn't open Outlook like it should. I am using Windows, and this feature is not working at all. It's really frustrating because I need to send this document quickly.
